title: Salesforce Multi-Touch Attribution Model
summary: Designed a weighted attribution model connecting recent email, event, sales and organisational engagement across complex education-sector buying committees.
outcomes: Allocated enquiry and referral influence across multiple channels
Created structured data for dashboards and revenue reporting
featuredMetric: Normalised attribution across applicable channels to 100%.

title: MCAE Migration and Platform Rebuild
summary: Led the migration from a high-risk Mailchimp and legacy CRM environment into a governed MCAE instance with consent, suppression and audience-management controls.
outcomes: Reduced approximately 30,000 legacy contacts to 19,000 viable prospects
featuredMetric: Improved successful send rate to approximately 99%.

title: Local-Authority Commercial Data Model
summary: Designed a Salesforce parent-account and contract-pricing model representing local-authority influence across accounts, contacts, leads and opportunities.
outcomes: Supported account governance and contract-based segmentation
featuredMetric: Applied across 1,000+ accounts and 20,000+ leads and contacts.

title: MCAE Campaign and Revenue Engine
summary: Managed segmented campaign operations across email, events, webinars and gated content while connecting performance with purchase and revenue influence.
outcomes: Supported events, webinars and gated content
featuredMetric: Raised average open rates from approximately 8% to 40%.

title: Recurring Newsletter Engagement Application
summary: Conceived, tested and deployed a mobile-friendly web application designed to sustain stakeholder engagement during a long B2B buying journey.
outcomes: Produced a viable prototype within one day
featuredMetric: Refined into a deployed product over approximately one week.

title: Youth Event Portfolio Growth
summary: Overhauled event strategy, marketing, CRM engagement and operational workflows to improve consistency, attendance and programme momentum.
featuredMetric: Tripled average attendance across the youth event portfolio.

title: Large-Scale International Conference Operations
summary: Managed planning, logistics, volunteer coordination and live operations for multi-day international conferences involving complex venues and high attendee volumes.
outcomes: Delivered multiple major and smaller international conferences
Supported complex venue and attendee operations
featuredMetric: Managed five week-long conferences with 30,000+ attendees each.
